title: Fix Vite+ task execution in mise
description: The current mise tasks call the globally installed vp binary. On this machine that global install cannot load the native rolldown binding, so vp fmt/lint/check fail with a resolve universal vite config error. Update the project to run the repo-local Vite+ binary after install so checks work reliably.
notes: Changed mise tasks to use pnpm install and pnpm exec vp so checks use the repo-local Vite+ binary. Verified mise run lint:app succeeds and mise run typecheck now reaches normal project findings instead of the native binding error.
